rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes matching the component type or implementation.
Validator diagnostics pointing to syntax errors like 'no viable alternative' often indicate invalid AGREE syntax or misplaced constructs.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers or previously declared helpers.
Align helper declarations with the types of the expressions they define.
Use only AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports must be in component type scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantee expressions.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and insertion location decisions
